title: Onboarding Funnel Intelligence
summary: Track activation funnel drop-off, isolate friction points, and rank onboarding opportunities.
knowledge_base: Onboarding Funnel Intelligence is positioned as a Product Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Track activation funnel drop-off, isolate friction points, and rank onboarding opportunities.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on activation, funnel, analytics.
